description: Expose the NotesApp Room database to other applications by implementing a ContentProvider. Create NoteContract.kt and NoteContentProvider.kt within the com.example.notesapp.provider package. The contract must include the authority "com.example.notesapp.provider", the CONTENT_URI, and constants for ID, title, content, and timestamp columns. The NoteContentProvider must handle directory and single item URIs via a UriMatcher, implement all standard provider methods (onCreate, query, insert, update, delete, getType) linked to the NoteDatabase, and be registered as exported in the AndroidManifest.xml. Ensure the project builds successfully using ./gradlew assembleDebug.
